name: foundry-research
description: Deep research agent with academic database search, structured source management, and multi-agent synthesis. Produces evidence-backed research reports.

interface.shortDescription: Evidence-backed deep research with academic search and synthesis
interface.longDescription: Use Foundry Research to run rigorous, multi-source research workflows with academic and web provider search, source downloading, structured evidence tracking, synthesis, verification, revision, reflection, and pipeline improvement skills.
defaultPrompt: Use Foundry Research to synthesize evidence for this research question.
Review and revise this completed deep research report.
Evaluate this completed research session and suggest improvements.
